Name: Pancake Sort
Author: Jacob E. Goodman
Description: Pancake sorting is the colloquial term for the mathematical problem of sorting a disordered stack of pancakes in order of size when a spatula can be inserted at any point in the stack and used to flip all pancakes above it. A pancake sort algorithm is an algorithm that solves this problem.
Algorithm: async function sort(){for(let a=array.length;a>1;--a){let i=0;for(let j=1;j<a;j++){await compare(j,i);if(array[j]>array[i])i=j}if(i!=a-1){if(await flip(0,i),firstRun)return;if(await flip(0,a-1),firstRun)return}}}
